calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Waiver Of Bond [Ccp 995.240] Or In The Alternative For Reconsideration Based On Additional New Evidence [Ccp 1008];
Off Calendar Nov-29-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SOLZER & HAIL INC.'S MOTION FOR A WAIVER OF BOND [CODE OF CIVIL PROCEURE SECTION 995.240], OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR RECONSIDERATION BASED ON ADDITIONAL NEW EVIDENCE [CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1008].
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. (302/PJM/SN) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Anne Hipshman, Esq., of Department of Industrial Relations , 415-703-4863 for plaintiff/respondent and moving party Jochen Wenzel
Elia Deluca, Esq. of Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer, 415-397-2800 for defendant/appellant and opposing party Solzer & Hail, Inc.

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
RESPONDENT JOCHEN WENZEL'S MOTION TO DISMISS IS DENIED BASED ON THE DECISION IN PROGESSIVE CONCRETE INC. V. BARKER (2006) 136 CAL APP 4TH 540. THE DECLARATION FOR RELIEF FROM POSTING A BOND IS INADEQUATE. ONLY CONCLUSORY STATEMENTS ARE MADE AS TO THE FINANCIAL CONDITION OF THE CORPORATION; THERE IS NO SHOWING THAT IT LACKS CASH OR OTHER ASSETS. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT IS REQUIED TO POST A BOND BY NOVEMBER 30, 2007. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600. (302/PJM/X-SN)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Continued To Dec-03-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Of Motion To Quash Notice To Appear At Trial And Produce Records In Lieu Of Subpoena (C.C.P. 1987(B) And (C); Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Elia M. Deluca
